data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command used was:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This filters xUnit tests using the `--filter` flag with the trait expression `Category=Integration`, which matches tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`.
